projectDescription: Interfere is a real-time issue intelligence platform that automatically detects, triages, and helps resolve software bugs before users report them.
keyFeatures: Automatic issue detection before users report problems
Full-stack root cause analysis linking bugs to code changes
Session replays attached to every detected issue
User impact tracking showing exactly who is affected
Consent management with CMP integrations (c15t, CookieYes, OneTrust)
OAuth applications and scoped API keys for developer integrations
Multiplayer collaboration via Slack, Teams, and in-app comments
Release tracking that connects deployments to regressions
SOC 2 Type II compliance (in observation period)
publicApiSurface: consent prop on InterfereProvider ({ analytics: boolean, replay: boolean })
identify() — associate visitors with persistent users
